c74object.name: jit.rtspbridge
c74object.digest: RTSP to Jitter matrix bridge with low-latency FFmpeg decoding.
c74object.description:
Connects to RTSP video streams (IP cameras, etc.) and outputs Jitter matrices for real-time video processing. Uses FFmpeg for decoding with low-latency optimizations. Decoding runs in a background thread to avoid blocking Max.
Outputs:
- left: 4-plane char Jitter matrix (ARGB)
- right: status messages (connected, url, transport)

inlet.description: Accepts messages: connect, disconnect, bang, url, dump.

outlet.description: Outputs jit_matrix with 4-plane char data (ARGB format) when banged. Matrix dimensions match the source video unless @outw/@outh are set.

Outputs status messages:
- connected 1 when connection starts
- connected 0 when disconnected
- url <symbol> (via dump)
- transport <symbol> (via dump)

objarg.name: (none)
objarg.description: jit.rtspbridge takes no creation arguments. Configure via attributes.

method.name: connect
method.description: Starts the background decode thread and connects to the RTSP stream specified by @url. Outputs connected 1 from the right outlet when connection is established.

method.name: disconnect
method.description: Stops the decode thread and closes the RTSP connection. Outputs connected 0 from the right outlet.

method.name: bang
method.description:
Outputs the latest decoded video frame as a Jitter matrix from the left outlet. Use with qmetro to drive frame output at your desired rate.
If no new frame is available, nothing is output.

method.name: url
method.description:
Sets the RTSP stream URL. If currently connected, disconnects first.
Example: url rtsp://admin:password@192.168.1.50:554/h264Preview_01_main

method.name: dump
method.description:
Outputs the current URL and transport setting from the right outlet as separate messages:
url <symbol>
transport <symbol>

attribute.name: url
attribute.description:
The RTSP stream URL to connect to.
Format: rtsp://[user:password@]host:port/path
Examples:
- rtsp://admin:pass@192.168.1.50:554/h264Preview_01_main (Reolink main)
- rtsp://admin:pass@192.168.1.50:554/h264Preview_01_sub (Reolink sub)

attribute.name: transport
attribute.description:
Transport protocol: tcp (default) or udp.
TCP is more reliable over networks. UDP may have slightly lower latency on local networks but can drop packets.

attribute.name: autoconnect
attribute.description: If enabled (1), automatically connects to the stream when the object is created and a URL is set.

attribute.name: outw
attribute.description:
Output matrix width. Set to 0 (default) to use the source video width.
Scaling adds processing overhead, so leave at 0 for lowest latency.

attribute.name: outh
attribute.description:
Output matrix height. Set to 0 (default) to use the source video height.
Scaling adds processing overhead, so leave at 0 for lowest latency.

attribute.name: verbose
attribute.description: If enabled (1), prints debug messages to the Max console including frame counts and decode status.
